name: Cherries'n' Cream Patty Shells
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pepperidge Farm Patty Shells (283g size)
1 package Pepperidge Farm Mini Patty Shells (269g size)
19 oz Cherry or Blueberry Pie Filling
recipeInstructions:
Shell: Bake either kind of patty shells according to package directions. Use a fork to remove the center tops and soft pastry underneath. Cool. Divide the Creamy Orange Filling among the pastry shells. Spoon the pie filling over the Creamy Orange Filling. Dust with icing sugar. Serve immediately. Makes 6 regular or 24 small desserts.
Creamy Orange Filling: Beat together all ingredients except the whipping cream until light. Whip the whipping cream and fold it in. Makes about 1 cup.
